mapper.select: SELECT d.delivery_id AS deliveryId, d.order_id AS orderId, o.user_id AS userId, d.receiver_name AS receiverName, d.receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, d.delivery_address AS deliveryAddress, d.delivery_status AS deliveryStatus, DATE_FORMAT(d.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS deliveryDate FROM deliveries d INNER JOIN orders o ON d.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY d.delivery_id DESC

SELECT d.delivery_id AS deliveryId, d.order_id AS orderId, o.user_id AS userId, d.receiver_name AS receiverName, d.receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, d.delivery_address AS deliveryAddress, d.delivery_status AS deliveryStatus, DATE_FORMAT(d.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS deliveryDate FROM deliveries d INNER JOIN orders o ON d.order_id = o.order_id WHERE d.delivery_id = #{deliveryId} AND o.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE deliveries SET delivery_status = #{deliveryStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE delivery_id = #{deliveryId}
